Projects.title: Multi-Agent AI Behaviour Detection System
desc: An AI-driven security monitoring system developed to detect and analyze human behavior. The system utilizes Computer Vision (YOLOv8) to recognize actions such as picking up or returning items.
It is seamlessly integrated with IoT hardware sensors (RC522 and UHF RFID readers) using Python for real-time item tracking, supported by a Multi-Agent System (MAS) architecture.

Projects.title: OrderBot Intelligent Robot Waiter
desc: System design and technical schematic for an intelligent robot waiter prototype. The robot is specifically designed to take orders, manage automated table cleaning, and process customer transactions.
The system includes the integration of specific hardware components, including physical payment modules for QR code and smart card scanning, designed in a detailed technical schematic style.

Projects.title: Automated Web Scraping & Data Extraction Pipeline
desc: An automated data extraction system built using Python scripts to collect and structure large-scale datasets from various web platforms.

This data pipeline was developed utilizing a combination of web crawling libraries such as Selenium, BeautifulSoup, and Scrapy to extract information from e-commerce and travel websites (Traveloka, Mudah.my, DataCamp) for downstream data analysis.
